case_title: SERVICE MASTER OF SAN MATEO/SAN FRANCISCO VS KUANG, HUANG DBA FU WAR RESTAURANT et al

docket_entries.description: ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT KUANG, HUANG DBA FU WAR RESTAURANT
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT FANG, QIAU MEI DBA FU WAR RESTAURANT

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $100.00 FILED BY SERVICE MASTER OF SAN MATEO/SAN FRANCISCO AS TO DEFENDANT KUANG, HUANG DBA FU WAR RESTAURANT FANG, QIAU MEI DBA FU WAR RESTAURANT ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-06-1998 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
DEFENDANT SENT $126.00 CHECK TO COURT.RETURNED CHECK WITH INFO;

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SERVICE MASTER OF SAN MATEO/SAN FRANCISCO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KUANG, HUANG DBA FU WAR RESTAURANT FANG, QIAU MEI DBA FU WAR RESTAURANT $100.00 PRINCIPAL, $26.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $126.00, PROOF OF SERVICE WAIVED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
CERTFD.MAIL TO HUANG KUANG/QIAUA MEI SANG FU WAR RESTAURANT RETURNED SIGNED.
